prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4G63T (from EVO III/IV) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 28psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft and HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold

Full custom wiring harness by Wireworks Japan for standalone ECU (Haltech Elite 2500) with dual Bosch 028 injectors, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor, and a custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-S front-mount with 3.5" piping) to fit the Delica's unique front-end structure

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco bolt-in 6-point roll cage (Delica-specific design) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 80-9070K) for the rear trailing arms, paired with Ohlins DFV coilovers (custom valving for 4WD weight distribution) and Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) on the front with stainless steel braided lines
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Delica Space Gear-specific, bolt-on fenders with 30mm extended wheel arches) paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +22 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (255/40/17)

Custom carbon fiber front bumper with integrated LED bar (Morimoto XB35) and a rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Delica-specific, bolt-on design with dual exhaust cutouts for HKS Hi-Power dual exit system)

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III seats (custom Delica floor mounts), Takata Drift II harnesses, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay (by AutoInk Japan) featuring a digital gauge cluster (Defi Advance BF) and a quick-release NRG steering wheel
